decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing the enchantress creatures and enchantment cards to create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. By playing enchantments like Enchantress's Presence and Sterling Grove, the deck aims to draw cards and set up its game plan. Using cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, the deck can control the board and generate advantage. With key pieces like Serra's Sanctum and Replenish, the deck can create a strong board presence and finish the game with a big swing. It aims to control the game and win through a combination of enchantment synergies.

The main concept of this Enchantress combo deck is to ramp up mana through enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, while drawing cards and generating value with Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Parallax Wave and use Replenish to bring back enchantments from the graveyard. Opalescence and Sterling Grove provide additional utility and protection, while Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing offer removal options. The overall goal is to create a powerful enchantment engine to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to cast Ill-Gotten Gains and Brain Freeze, enabling a powerful mill win condition. The deck utilizes cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Cabal Ritual to generate mana quickly, while Intuition and Infernal Contract help search for key pieces. Cephalid Coliseum also serves as a way to help fill the graveyard for Ill-Gotten Gains. The deck is designed to be fast and efficient, aiming to disrupt the opponent's strategy and win the game through a sudden burst of milling.

The deck focuses on using the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to quickly bring out a powerful creature while countering opponent's spells and controlling the game with cards like Counterspell and Foil. The goal is to efficiently assemble the combo while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and bounce spells, ultimately overwhelming them with a massive, hard to deal with creature. Each card is carefully chosen to support this strategy and ensure a fast and decisive victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to generate mana and card advantage, while also controlling the board with removal spells and protective enchantments. By using cards such as Enchantress's Presence and Argothian Enchantress to draw cards, and Serra's Sanctum to convert enchantments into mana, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces such as Opalescence and Replenish to overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing help to disrupt the opponent's game plan, providing a well-rounded strategy that combines acceleration, control, and a powerful win condition.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing counterspells, removal spells, and land destruction to prevent the opponent from executing their game plan. The goal is to establish a lock on the game using cards like Standstill and Decree of Justice, while slowly building up resources and advantage. The deck aims to stall the opponent's progress, control the board, and eventually win through incremental advantage or a large creature like Exalted Angel. By controlling the pace of the game and disrupting the opponent's strategy, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver its opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Dark Ritual, Putrid Imp, and Life/Death, then bringing them back with cards like Reanimate and Exhume. Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Rorix Bladewing are key targets for these reanimation spells, providing a powerful and fast win condition. The deck also includes disruption elements like Cabal Therapy and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also using cards like Duress to protect its own combo pieces. The overall strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with big threats early in the game.

This deck focuses on aggressive early plays combined with land destruction to disrupt the opponent's mana base and overwhelm them with threats. The key strategy is to quickly ramp out powerful creatures like Terravore and Treetop Village, while also using Armageddon to reset the board and leave opponents struggling to recover. The deck also includes utility cards like Swords to Plowshares and Sylvan Library to control the game and maintain card advantage. Overall, the goal is to establish a dominant board presence and quickly close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck aims to cheat out Phyrexian Dreadnought as quickly as possible and protect it with Stifle and other counterspells. By using counterspells and card draw spells, the deck can disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win condition. The goal is to create a powerful board presence with Phyrexian Dreadnought while keeping the opponent's threats at bay, ultimately achieving victory through a swift and powerful combo.

This deck focuses on quickly generating mana with elves and Gaea's Cradle, then using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for combo pieces like Phyrexian Devourer and Triskelion. The goal is to assemble the combo of Devourer and Triskelion to deal infinite damage to the opponent. The deck also has some disruptive elements like Waterfront Bouncer and Opposition to control the board and protect the combo. The strategy revolves around efficiently using mana acceleration and card selection to execute the combo as quickly and consistently as possible.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cards to quickly bring out Phyrexian Dreadnought and using Stifle to counteract its drawback. Counterspell, Foil, Thwart, and Misdirection provide control and protection, while Gush and Opt offer card advantage and selection. Peek and Vision Charm allow for manipulation of both your deck and your opponent's. It is important to carefully time and prioritize the use of cards like Daze and Chain of Vapor for maximum effectiveness. Powder Keg serves as a versatile removal option.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with a swarm of Goblin creatures, using cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to search for key pieces like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader. The deck accelerates with cards like Forest','','');">Karplusan Forest and utilizes disruption with Wasteland and Rishadan Port. Key cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator provide additional power and removal options. The goal is to establish a fast and aggressive board presence, utilizing the synergy between Goblin creatures to deal damage and control the game.

This deck focuses on disrupting your opponent's strategy while building up your own resources. Using cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to strip away key cards from your opponent's hand, you can control the pace of the game. With creatures like Yavimaya Elder and Ravenous Baloth, you can generate card advantage and outvalue your opponent in the long run. Pernicious Deed serves as a versatile board wipe, while Treetop Village provides a threat that can also serve as a blocker. The overall strategy is to grind out your opponent with efficient removal and resilient threats.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive Goblin creatures, supported by cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief to quickly establish a board presence. Cards like Goblin Piledriver and Goblin Ringleader provide additional threats and card advantage, while Gempalm Incinerator offers removal options. The deck is designed to apply constant pressure while disrupting the opponent's resources through cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland, ultimately aiming to win the game through a combination of damage and tempo advantage.

The deck focuses on generating mana through enchantments like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, which allows for explosive plays. The Enchantress creatures, such as Argothian Enchantress, help draw through the deck quickly, while Sterling Grove protects key pieces. The combo of Opalescence and Parallax Wave can be a win condition by turning all enchantments into creatures and removing opponents' threats. Solitary Confinement provides protection, while Seal of Cleansing and Swords to Plowshares offer removal options. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a powerful enchantment-based strategy.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through a combination of hand disruption, creature removal, and board wipes. Utilizing a mix of discard spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, along with removal spells like Smother and Pernicious Deed, the deck aims to control the game until it can establish a strong board presence with creatures like Ravenous Baloth and Graveborn Muse. The inclusion of utility lands like Pine Barrens and Dust Bowl also helps to further disrupt the opponent's resources and maintain the deck's control over the game.
